message:
feat: Implement descrobject.zig TODO stubs with real functionality

- descr_repr_helper: Full repr formatting with kind, name, and type
- classmethod_descr_get: Binds method to type instead of instance
- mappingproxy_len: Call PyObject_Size on underlying mapping
- mappingproxy_getitem: Call PyObject_GetItem on underlying mapping

Reduces TODO count from 45 to 41.
